name: Creamy Pineapple Salad
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
Drain the pineapple, reserving the juice in a small saucepan. Set aside.
Add enough water to the juice to make 1 - 1/3 cups; bring to a boil. Place the gelatin in a bowl; add boiling liquid and stir until dissolved. Cool until slightly thickened. In a mixing bowl, whip cream; gradually beat in sugar. Fold into the gelatin mixture. Stir in pineapple and cottage cheese; blend well. Pour into a 1 - 1/2 quart serving bowl; chill at least 3 hours or overnight.
